name: lie_best_fit_v4_svgtrace_refmap_y706050_q010_alphaMin1e-3
description: Best-fit effective parameters for the Lie (Li et al. 2020, BIT27491) deformation benchmark using manually traced Inkscape SVG outlines (Video S1). This calibration uses transport_mode=refmap (alpha mapped by displacement), an interior dx quantile (q=0.1), and continuity-based experimental tracking to avoid multi-intersection jumps. NOTE: these are effective poroelastic surrogate parameters and are not directly comparable to the Oldroyd-B PF parameters in the paper.

experimental_extraction.notes: The SVG series currently has 160 frames (missing frame_0123.svg). The extractor skips missing frames; add the missing SVG for a complete per-frame exp outline series.

fit_metrics.notes: Metrics computed by examples/biofilms/benchmarks/lie/compare_exp_sim_timeseries_dx.py for out/_lie_refmap_y706050_best_vtk_dt1 (same physics/params as the optimizer run). Relative error uses the paper's 'every second datum' convention as implemented in the script.

repro_command_fit: conda run --no-capture-output -n fenicsx python -u examples/biofilms/benchmarks/lie/lie_synthetic_deformation_one_domain.py --backend cpp --transport-mode refmap --alpha0-file examples/biofilms/benchmarks/lie/biofilm_exp_s1_frame0_polygon_mm_svgtrace_q010_base_cont.csv --alpha0-scale 1e-3 --alpha0-align block --restrict-skeleton-dofs --restrict-skeleton-alpha-min 0.001 --G-b 9.682e-3 --mu-b 2.182e-2 --kappa-inv 1e9 --mu-b-model mu --mu-b-fluid 30494 --solid-model linear --u-avg 6e-4 --t-ramp 8 --dt 1 --t-final 20 --allow-dt-reduction --dt-min 0.1 --dt-reduction-factor 0.5 --stop-on-steady --steady-tol 1e-12 --nx 40 --ny 20 --nx-left 14 --nx-mid 12 --nx-right 14 --ny-bottom 4 --ny-top 16 --q 4 --vtk-every 0 --alpha-ch-M 0 --alpha-ch-gamma 0 --dx-intersection leftmost --dx-quantile 0.1 --y-fracs 0.7,0.6,0.5 --out-dir out/_lie_best_fit_v4_svgtrace_refmap
repro_command_overlay: conda run --no-capture-output -n fenicsx python -u examples/biofilms/benchmarks/lie/lie_synthetic_deformation_one_domain.py --backend cpp --transport-mode refmap --alpha0-file examples/biofilms/benchmarks/lie/biofilm_exp_s1_frame0_polygon_mm_svgtrace_q010_base_cont.csv --alpha0-scale 1e-3 --alpha0-align block --restrict-skeleton-dofs --restrict-skeleton-alpha-min 0.001 --G-b 9.682e-3 --mu-b 2.182e-2 --kappa-inv 1e9 --mu-b-model mu --mu-b-fluid 30494 --solid-model linear --u-avg 6e-4 --t-ramp 8 --dt 1 --t-final 20 --nx 40 --ny 20 --nx-left 14 --nx-mid 12 --nx-right 14 --ny-bottom 4 --ny-top 16 --q 4 --vtk-every 1 --alpha-ch-M 0 --alpha-ch-gamma 0 --dx-intersection leftmost --dx-quantile 0.1 --y-fracs 0.7,0.6,0.5 --out-dir out/_lie_refmap_y706050_best_vtk_dt1 && python -u examples/biofilms/benchmarks/lie/make_overlay_video_exp_sim_svgtrace.py --sim-dir out/_lie_refmap_y706050_best_vtk_dt1
